title: TMC moves Supreme Court against exclusion of State employees from vote counting supervisor duty
description: The All India Trinamool Congress (AITMC) has moved the Supreme Court against the Chief Electoral Officer's decision to deploy only Central government employees as vote counting supervisors for the assembly elections in West Bengal.The matter is listed for urgent hearing on Saturday before a Bench of Justices PS Narasimha and Joymalya Bagchi since counting of votes is scheduled to be held on May 4. Justices PS Narasimha and Joymalya BagchiThe plea has been filed against the order of the Calcutta
